meta.title: Accelerating Your AI Career
meta.description:
0:00-6:45 Opening & Speaker Intro
7:44-13:04 How speakers Andrew Ng, Allie K. Miller, and Shravan Goli got started in AI
14:20-20:48 How to get started and what to expect in the future of AI
20:49-24:13 How every type of company or business can utilize AI
20:14-27:05 Community in AI
28:41-32:47 Non-technical roles and how they can be a part of AI
33:06-34:53 Suggestions for businesses to start thinking about/applying AI 
35:50-39:07 What online courses should I take to step into AI?
39:11-43:56 Learn by doing, and create projects that you're interested in!
44:04-50:31 Becoming an AI entrepreunier
51:06-56:32 Q&A: There's just so much to learn in both ML and DL that it's just overwhelming. Given a chance, how would you learn AI if you had to start over?
56:44-1:00:29 Q&A: How much math do I need to know before taking any ML/AI course? And what's the best way to learn ML to improve my skills?
1:00:53-1:06:36 Q&A: There is a clear need for entry-level jobs, like ML developers. What is your opinion about opportunities in AI for project managers, consultants, etc?
1:06:56-1:14:32 Q&A: What sort of real-time project would you recommend for students that would add potential value to their resume or portfolio? What's your take on Kaggle projects?
1:14:40-1:20:48 Q&A: Is it possible to work on cutting-edge AI in the best research labs without a Master's degree? 
1:21:10-1:29:25 Demo on the new Machine Learning Specialization 


Welcome! - This is an interactive panel discussion on Accelerating Your AI Career.  In this session, you will meet industry and academic leaders, and hear their stories and insights on career professional development in AI and the future of AI. Special thanks to Coursera and Stanford Online for co-hosting the event with us!

We will be taking questions during the event. Please submit your question or upvote others' here: https://app.sli.do/event/eTWfWyZRCjnn5RQTvncA8e/live/questions

Speakers:
Andrew Ng, Founder of DeepLearning.Ai
https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrewyng/

Allie K. Miller, Artificial Intelligence Leader and Investor
https://www.linkedin.com/in/alliekmiller/

Shravan Goli, Chief Product Officer, Coursera
https://www.linkedin.com/in/shravan/

To learn more about Machine Learning Specialization and enroll: https://bit.ly/3otZs7g

Let us know how we're doing? We will be giving out discount codes for a selected number of people who fill out the survey: https://forms.gle/A1t8K2rbXycq9TaGA 

To learn more about us and signup for future events:
DeepLearning.AI: https://www.deeplearning.ai/
